messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Load Balancer

```hcl
resource "oci_load_balancer_load_balancer" "lb" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name   = "my-lb"
  shape          = "flexible"
  subnet_ids     = [oci_core_subnet.public_subnet.id]

  reserved_public_ip_id = oci_core_public_ip.lb_ip.id
}
```

### Backend Set

```hcl
resource "oci_load_balancer_backend_set" "web" {
  load_balancer_id = oci_load_balancer_load_balancer.lb.id
  name            = "web-backend"
  policy         = "ROUND_ROBIN"

  health_checker {
    protocol            = "HTTP"
    port               = 80
    url_path           = "/health"
    response_body_regex = ".*OK.*"
  }
}
```

### Backend

```hcl
resource "oci_load_balancer_backend" "web1" {
  load_balancer_id  = oci_load_balancer_load_balancer.lb.id
  backend_set_name = "web-backend"
  ip_address       = "10.0.1.10"
  port             = 80
  weight           = 1
}
